2026 MONACO GRAND PRIX
07 - 09 June 2026
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To All Teams, All Officials
Document 28
Date 05 June 2026
Time 15:55
Title Infringement - Free Practice 1 Deleted Lap Times
Description Infringement - Free Practice 1 Deleted Lap Times
Enclosed MON DOC 28 - Free Practice 1 Deleted Lap Times.pdf
Garry Connelly Tanja Geilhausen
Derek Warwick Jean-François Calmes

 
 
2026 MONACO GRAND PRIX 
05 – 07 June 2026 
 
    
From The Stewards      Document 28 
  
To All Officials, All Teams      Date  05 June 2026 
 
        Time  15:55 
  
 
The Stewards, having received a report from the Race Director, have considered the following matter and determine the 
following: 
 
Session Free Practice 1 
  
Fact The F1 cars below did not use the track at turns 1, 5, 10, 11 and 16. 
 
No. Turn Car Driver Competitor Time of Day  Lap Time 
1 5 16  Charles Leclerc Scuderia Ferrari HP 13:31:16 OUT LAP 
2 10 43  Franco Colapinto BWT Alpine F1 Team 13:32:58 1:26.305 
3 10 16 Charles Leclerc Scuderia Ferrari HP 13:36:30 PIT 
4 10 14 Fernando Alonso Aston Martin Aramco F1 Team 13:37:10 PIT 
5 10 55 Carlos Sainz Atlassian Williams F1 Team 13:37:26 1:20.942 
6 10 10 Pierre Gasly BWT Alpine
